description:
Open Sudoku is an Open Source Sudoku game.
Open Sudoku is an open source sudoku game.

Features:
- Without any ads
- Several input modes (3 visual keyboards, physical keyboard supported)
- Puzzles can be downloaded from web, entered by hand or generated using our webpage
- Game time and undo
- Export to file
- Themes
- And much more

Go to http://opensudoku.moire.org for more information. Your feedback and/or code patches/suggestions are welcome!
